articles.title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
articles.summary: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.

articles.title: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
articles.summary: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.

articles.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
articles.summary: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.

articles.title: Work with Codex from anywhere
articles.summary: Use Codex anywhere with the ChatGPT mobile app. Monitor, steer, and approve coding tasks in real time across devices and remote environments.

articles.title: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
articles.summary: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely.

articles.title: Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows
articles.summary: Learn how OpenAI built a secure sandbox for Codex on Windows, enabling safe, efficient coding agents with controlled file access and network restrictions.
